result.network_evidence: Multiple POST requests to BardChatUi/data/batchexecute failed with net::ERR_CONNECTION_RESET, net::ERR_CONNECTION_CLOSED, net::ERR_HTTP2_PROTOCOL_ERROR. 64 requests total, 39 console errors. Page remained on initial welcome screen without navigating to chat. CSP violation: connect-src blocked. Console shows 'The action has been blocked' messages.

notes: BLOCKED_SILENT_RESET 패턴 확인. APF 프록시가 Gemini batchexecute API 연결을 차단하여 프론트엔드가 초기 화면에 머무름. 경고 메시지 미표시 — C++ generator 수정 필요. IPv6 DPDK issue known.
